response.justification: Bogdan's resume shows extensive experience in full-stack development, cloud infrastructure, and AI-agent tooling, but lacks direct experience with SoC/IP modeling, hardware-software co-design, or AI accelerator optimization. While he demonstrates strong software engineering skills and system architecture knowledge, his background does not align closely with the hardware-centric, performance-focused requirements of the Principal Performance Architect role.
strengths: Strong full-stack software engineering and cloud infrastructure experience
Proven ability to work across multiple languages and domains
Experience with performance optimization in distributed systems
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC/IP modeling or AI accelerator hardware
Lacks background in deep neural network workload analysis or GPU architecture
Education and experience are primarily in software development rather than hardware optimization
